name: Agfa XPS 160
description: Inspired by the look of vintage photos shot on Agfacolor Portrait XPS 160, this recipe leans into a softer, cooler palette with a character reminiscent of old color negative film. While this recipe can work for portraits, I don't think I'll choose it over something like the Rich Tone Portrait profile, unless I'm shooting during cold, rainy days where the cooler tones feel more fitting.
author: Mihai Serban
